_doc: Per-recipe filename-prefix → camera mapping for ASI annotation backfill. Camera convention does NOT generalize across shoots — must be verified visually per recipe and cached here. See ~/.claude/projects/.../memory/feedback_camera_detection_per_recipe.md.
_prefix_keying: First 5 chars of source filename (e.g. 'B19I6', 'AI2I5', 'A057_'). Match the keying used by backfill_camera_labels.py.
